entries.mem0ai/mem0: A universal memory layer and official Hermes Agent provider available as a managed cloud or self-hosted OSS. It utilizes hybrid retrieval and multi-level memory to track user, session, and agent state.
entries.supermemoryai/supermemory: An official Hermes Agent memory engine featuring a custom vector graph and byte-level deduplication. It delivers sub-300ms recall and maintains persistent memory graphs for personalized context across conversations.
entries.volcengine/OpenViking: An official open-source context database that uses a tiered L0/L1/L2 loading system to reduce token consumption. It organizes memories via a filesystem-based structure and provides visualized retrieval trajectories for debugging.
entries.garrytan/gbrain: An opinionated memory system that automatically extracts typed entity relationships into a self-wiring knowledge graph. It features a synthesis layer for cited prose answers and supports scoped data access for multi-user company brains.
entries.vectorize-io/hindsight: A learning-focused memory system that implements retain, recall, and reflect workflows for long-term knowledge. It acts as an LLM wrapper supporting providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini.
entries.campfirein/byterover-cli: An official provider that treats memory as a version-controlled git repository using a markdown context tree. It offers 5-tier retrieval with sub-100ms latency and supports branching and merging of agent context.
entries.plastic-labs/honcho: A stateful memory library that extracts reasoning-based conclusions rather than simple text chunks. It models multi-peer perspectives to track what different entities know about one another.
entries.greyhaven-ai/autocontext: A recursive self-improving harness that distills successful agent strategies into reusable playbooks. It provides structured output via trace.jsonl logs and supports integration through a CLI and MCP server.
entries.AxDSan/mn Postgres: A zero-dependency memory system utilizing a SQLite backend for sub-millisecond retrieval. It manages long-term knowledge through episodic compression and temporal triples.
entries.stephenschoettler/hermes-tool-slimmer: A utility that reduces prompt token overhead by using local BM25 ranking to select relevant tool schemas. It includes a dashboard to track token savings and is compatible with Hermes Agent v0.14.0.
entries.stephenschoettler/hermes-lcm: A lossless context management plugin that uses a hierarchical summary DAG for depth-aware compaction. It preserves raw messages in a SQLite store and provides specialized tools like lcm_grep for retrieval.
entries.elkimek/honcho-self-hosted: A self-hosted backend for Honcho that enables private cross-session persistence for Hermes Agent. It supports local inference servers and OpenAI-compatible providers via a Docker, PostgreSQL, and Redis setup.
entries.Signet-AI/signetai: A local-first identity and secrets layer that provides portable state across Hermes Agent, Claude Code, and MCP clients. It uses SQLite for storage and allows users to repair, edit, or reclassify agent context.
entries.yoloshii/ClawMem: An on-device context engine that eliminates cloud dependencies and API keys. It employs a hybrid retrieval approach combining BM25, vector search, and knowledge graphs.
entries.plur-ai/plur: A shared memory layer using an open YAML engram format to eliminate API costs in multi-agent systems. It utilizes ACT-R activation to strengthen relevant facts while decaying stale information.
entries.EfficientContext/ContextPilot: A context optimization tool that increases cache hits by 4–12× through prefix reordering and deduplication. It reduces prefill latency for RAG and agentic workloads across SGLang, vLLM, and llama.cpp.
entries.yantrikos/yantrikdb-hermes-plugin: An embedded, self-maintaining plugin that provides explainable recall via why_retrieved tags. It tracks contradictions and canonicalizes duplicates without requiring a separate server or GPU.
entries.yepyhun/Brainstack: A memory kernel stack that consolidates temporal continuity, graph truth, and corpus retrieval. It leverages a multi-layered storage approach using SQLite, Kuzu, and Chroma to reduce prompt noise.
entries.keepnotes-ai/keep: A reflective memory system combining BM25 full-text search with ranked graph traversal. It automatically indexes local directories, URLs, and multimedia files using edge tags for navigable relationships.
entries.amanning3390/flowstate-qmd: An anticipatory memory system that prefetches context by monitoring agent session logs. It uses local-first storage with SQLite-vec and GGUF models via node-llama-cpp.
entries.Ladybug-Memory/hermes-memory-plugin: A local-only plugin using a columnar .lbdb embedded graph database for importance-weighted recall. It surfaces high-priority memories first and supports optional GLiNER2 entity extraction.
entries.MukundaKatta/hermes-agentmemory: A pull-model episodic memory plugin that ensures complete deletion of memories without leaving persistent summaries. It provides a trace.jsonl audit log for every operation and on-demand summarization.
entries.futurebrowser/hermes-exabase-plugin: A plugin that integrates Exabase M-1 for self-organizing long-term memory. It provides tools for manual storage and configurable query expansion for improved retrieval reranking.

entries.nexu-io/open-design: A local-first design and prototyping system that generates prototypes, decks, and motion graphics. It integrates with 21 local CLIs via MCP server installation and provides 150 design systems and 261 plugins.
entries.mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills: A library of 754 structured cybersecurity skills mapped to major frameworks like MITRE ATT&CK and NIST CSF 2.0. It is compatible with the agentskills.io standard for sub-second skill discovery across 26 security domains.
entries.Agents365-ai/drawio-skill: Enables the generation of draw.io diagrams from natural language, including ERD, UML, and Architecture presets. It supports automated structure diagrams for Python, JS-TS, Go, and Rust using over 10,000 official shapes.
entries.conorbronsdon/avoid-ai-writing: An auditing tool that eliminates detectable AI writing patterns through rewrite, detect, and edit-in-place modes. It utilizes a 109-entry word replacement table and 48 pattern categories to refine content.
entries.AMAP-ML/SkillClaw: An agentic evolver that automates skill deduplication and quality improvement through background evolution loops. It unifies skill libraries across agents and teams with native integration for Hermes and OpenClaw.
entries.wondelai/skills: A cross-platform library providing modular frameworks for architecture, UX design, marketing, and product strategy. It supports installation via a marketplace or npx CLI for Claude Code and agentskills.io-compatible agents.
entries.Romanescu11/hermes-skill-factory: A meta-skill plugin that monitors active workflows to automatically detect and propose reusable skills. It generates Python plugin scaffolds and SKILL.md documentation via dedicated slash commands.
entries.DougTrajano/pydantic-ai-skills: Provides type-safe agentskills.io support for Pydantic AI using progressive disclosure to reduce token usage. It supports both programmatic Python definitions and filesystem-based skill loading.
entries.ZeroPointRepo/youtube-skills: Offers YouTube search, channel browsing, and transcript extraction without relying on yt-dlp. These skills are compatible with Hermes Agent, OpenClaw, Claude Code, and Windsurf.
entries.amanning3390/hermeshub: A community hub for browsing and one-click installation of skills, featuring a creator marketplace with crypto and Stripe payments. It includes security scanning with 65+ threat detection rules and an agent-to-agent trust scoring system.
entries.Cranot/super-hermes: Teaches Hermes Agent to write its own analytical prompts and custom thinking instructions for complex problems. It generates constraint reports to identify analysis blind spots and structural conservation laws in codebases.
entries.ReinaMacCredy/maestro: A harness for long-running agents featuring structured memory, gated lifecycles, and a plan-approve-execute workflow. It stores work and proof in plain files and integrates with Claude Code and Codex agents.
entries.tlehman/litprog-skill: A literate programming skill that weaves code and documentation into .lit.md files. It uses a tangler to extract runnable source files and automatically syncs edits back to the literate document.
entries.AkoliteZA/hermes-agent-idea-workflow: A pre-build workflow that converts rough ideas into structured design documents and implementation handoffs. It offers Lite and Full modes and includes a spec review gate with PASS/FAIL evaluation models.
entries.esaradev/icarus-plugin: Implements self-memory and replacement models using markdown-based fabric directories for cross-instance shared memory. It provides a pipeline for extracting training data and fine-tuning replacement models.
entries.smartcontractkit/chainlink-agent-skills: Provides agentskills.io-compliant tools for interacting with the Chainlink oracle network. It supports CCIP cross-chain messaging, VRF v2.5 subscription management, and Data Feed integration.
entries.armelhbobdad/bmad-module-skill-forge: Converts repositories, documentation, and developer discourse into agentskills.io-compliant skills. It supports version-pinned, immutable skills and links instructions to specific file lines or URLs.
entries.black-forest-labs/skills: Official FLUX image generation skills providing standardized prompting guidelines for FLUX.1 and FLUX.2. It includes API integration patterns for webhooks and support for precise hex color specifications.
entries.chigwell/skilldock.io: A registry of reusable AI skills based on the AgentSkills specification featuring recursive dependency resolution. It includes an OpenAPI-driven Python client and commerce support via TON and Stripe.
entries.tiann/execplan-skill: Facilitates the autonomous execution of complex, multi-step tasks with real-time progress tracking. It includes built-in rollback procedures to ensure safe recovery during long-running operations.
entries.cablate/Agentic-MCP-Skill: A progressive MCP client that uses three-layer lazy loading to minimize token consumption. It features a socket-based daemon for persistent server management and supports JSON hot-reloading.
entries.adnw-vinc/hermes-nextcloud: Allows Hermes Agent to manage Nextcloud files, notes, calendars, and contacts via WebDAV and CalDAV. It uses HTTPS with Nextcloud App Passwords and includes a guided setup script.
entries.PederHP/skillsdotnet: A C# / .NET implementation of the agentskills.io specification with MCP integration. It uses SKILL.md files for progressive disclosure and integrates with Microsoft.Extensions.AI for tool loading.
entries.Sahil-SS9/hermes-multichannel-prompt-opt: A plugin that rewrites and scores prompts across CLI, TUI, Discord, and Telegram to reduce token usage by 20–80%. It tailors prompt structures based on the specific model vendor's reasoning capabilities.
entries.willingning-coder/eagle-eye: An intelligent retrieval system using a 5-layer approach—including FTS5, dense embeddings, and RRF fusion—to filter 100+ skills down to the five most relevant. This reduces token consumption via a zero-invasive integration.
entries.mag3nt-com/openclaw-skill: Automates HTTP 402 payment resolution using USDC virtual cards across Base, Solana, and most EVM networks. It supports x402, MPP, AP2, and Pay Link protocols.

entries.numtide/llm-agents.nix: A collection of Nix packages that enables instant execution of Hermes and other AI coding agents via simple nix run commands. It ensures software freshness through daily automatic updates for all included packages.
entries.marshallrichards/ClawPhone: A set of scripts and guides designed to run agent CLIs on Android smartphones via Termux. It features an automated installer for ARM64 devices and leverages Termux:API and Termux:GUI for direct hardware access.
entries.rookiemann/portable-hermes-agent: A zero-install Windows desktop distribution featuring a GUI and 100 built-in tools across 20 toolsets. It supports local models via LM Studio and includes a dynamic tool maker for custom automation pipelines.
entries.AbuZar-Ansarii/Hermes-Agent-On-Android: A Termux-based installer providing a one-line script to deploy Hermes Agent on Android. It supports over 200 models, including Ollama for local execution to enhance privacy and reduce costs.
entries.ultraworkers/hermes-agent-helm-chart: A community Helm chart for Kubernetes deployments that implements cloud-native state-safety guardrails for persistent storage. It supports both direct deployments and operator-ready CRD-based workflows.
entries.TheAiSingularity/hermesclaw: A security-focused deployment that sandboxes the agent using kernel-level enforcement of network, filesystem, and process limits. It offers dynamic security policies and integrates with IDEs and MCP servers.
entries.xmbshwll/hermes-agent-docker: A streamlined Docker sandbox image that bundles the official Hermes installation with mini-swe-agent. It supports persistent state through mounted home directories and allows for custom tag builds.
entries.0xrsydn/nix-hermes-agent: A NixOS module and package that provides declarative management of agent configurations and systemd services. It ensures reproducible deployments with secure secrets handling via sops-nix integration.
entries.JackTheGit/hermes-autonomous-server: A production-ready headless deployment that configures Hermes Gateway as a reboot-safe systemd service. It is optimized for Ubuntu and Debian servers to execute recurring AI cron jobs autonomously.
entries.jpalmae/hermeshq: A Docker-first control plane that orchestrates multiple Hermes Agent instances with separate identities from a single web application. It enables hierarchy-aware task delegation and enterprise MCP access for external integrations.
entries.ellickjohnson/portainer-stack-hermes: A Docker Compose stack designed for Portainer deployment that includes a ttyd web terminal for remote access. It utilizes GitHub Actions for automated image builds and Git Repository stack management.

entries.builderz-labs/mission-control: A self-hosted orchestration layer that allows users to dispatch tasks and monitor spending across multi-agent workflows. It features a dependency-free SQLite stack and the Aegis review system to ensure high-quality task gates across CrewAI, LangGraph, and AutoGen.
entries.agent-of-empires/agent-of-empires: A management surface providing TUI and PWA dashboards to monitor various coding agents, including Hermes and Claude Code. It ensures secure execution through Docker, Podman, and Apple Container sandboxing while utilizing git worktrees for parallel agent operations.
entries.CryptoDmitry/hermes-agent-control-room: A control-room template designed to scale Hermes deployments from a single VPS agent to complex specialist teams. It implements a sidecar control plane for governance and utilizes task bus patterns for structured delegation.
entries.Agent-3-7/minions: A supervision hub that lets users create and review autonomous Hermes Agent work via a centralized screen. It features a Kanban board for status tracking and live streaming of agent reasoning for human-in-the-loop verification.
entries.swarmclawai/swarmclaw: A framework for building autonomous agent swarms with support for over 23 LLM providers, including Ollama and Hermes. It manages swarms through heartbeats and schedules, featuring durable memory and the ability to learn new skills from conversations.
entries.shannhk/hermes-agent-control-room: A scaling template that uses a level-based architecture to transition from single agents to automated teams. It includes a task bus for handoffs and bundled skills for VPS provisioning, security auditing, and backup management.
entries.linke-ai/hermes-agent-team: A local collaboration system that orchestrates Leader and Specialist agents using MCP and ACP protocols. It provides a real-time Web UI to monitor agent dialogues and manage the task lifecycle via Hermes Kanban.
entries.1ilkhamov/opencode-hermes-multiagent: A specialized collective of 17 agents dedicated to research, planning, and implementation. The system enforces strict quality gates through mandatory reviewer and tester agents to secure infrastructure and refactoring pipelines.
entries.howdymary/hermes-agent-metaharness: A meta-optimization harness that uses automated outer-loop searches to refine agent code. It orchestrates TBLite and TB2 benchmark evaluations to track performance frontiers through structured mutation and comparison.
entries.runtimenoteslabs/gladiator: An agent-vs-agent arena where autonomous AI companies compete for GitHub stars. It orchestrates nine agents using Paperclip and Hermes Agent, visualizing the competition via a real-time scoreboard and task dashboard.
entries.Rainhoole/hermes-agent-acp-skill: An ACP-style delegation tool that routes tasks between Hermes subagents, Codex, and Claude Code. It prevents parent context pollution through isolated workflows and enforces safety via configurable timeouts and output limits.

entries.colbymchenry/codegraph: A local pre-indexed code knowledge graph that optimizes agent performance by reducing tool calls by 58% and costs by 16%. It provides semantic intelligence for Hermes Agent and other coding assistants without requiring a Node.js installation.
entries.junhoyeo/tokscale: A high-performance Rust-based TUI for tracking token usage across various clients, including Hermes Agent and Claude Code. It visualizes costs through a dedicated dashboard and a 3D contributions graph.
entries.liaohch3/claude-tap: A local trace viewer designed to inspect API traffic, system prompts, and tool schemas for agents like Hermes Agent. It allows developers to pinpoint context changes by comparing adjacent requests.
entries.Salomondiei08/oh-my-hermes: An opinionated workflow layer that orchestrates 23 skills to automate the building, shipping, and monitoring of applications. It integrates Hermes Agent with tools like Vercel, Supabase, and Sentry for autonomous GitHub issue triage and security reviews.
entries.joeynyc/hermes-skins: A collection of community-driven CLI skins and themes to customize the Hermes terminal UI. It allows users to modify ASCII art, colors, and labels via YAML configurations and themed presets.
entries.AlexAI-MCP/hermes-CCC: A port of the Hermes Agent brain and 46 core skills directly into the Claude Code Channel. This integration eliminates the need for OAuth or external processes and includes MLOps tools for RL training and vLLM inference.
entries.unmodeled-tyler/vessel-browser: An AI-native browser featuring native MCP integration for autonomous agent control. It provides a human-in-the-loop interface with action rollbacks, approvals, and durable session management.
entries.Abruptive/Ankh.md: A TAW Agent framework that enables the creation of scoped Hermes Agents with per-folder configurations. It allows users to switch between default and project-local agents with dedicated memories and tools.
entries.adityahimaone/hermes-agent-rtk-caveman: A preconfigured setup utilizing RTK and Caveman templating to achieve 90-99% token savings. It includes over 40 specialized skills for research, finance, and devops with automated cross-platform installation.
entries.roli-lpci/lintlang: A deterministic static linter that scans agent configs and system prompts for failure modes using HERM v1.1 scoring. It integrates into CI/CD pipelines to provide fast, free scanning without requiring LLM calls.
entries.42-evey/evey-setup: A rapid deployment stack that uses Docker to run Hermes Agent with LiteLLM, Ollama, and Qdrant. It includes 29 community plugins to enable zero-cost local GPU inference and free model routing.
entries.0xNyk/openclaw-to-hermes: A migration utility that transfers personas, memories, and skills from OpenClaw to Hermes Agent. It maps complex model configurations and handles credential transfers from system-level environment files.

entries.farion1231/cc-switch: A cross-platform manager built on Tauri 2 that provides a unified interface for Hermes Agent alongside other major CLI tools like Claude Code and Gemini CLI. It simplifies the installation and switching process across Windows, macOS, and Linux environments.
entries.iOfficeAI/AionUi: This local open-source 'cowork' app provides a unified GUI for over 13 CLI agents, including Hermes Agent. It features a built-in engine for web search and file access, and can automatically generate editable office documents like Morph PPTs and Excel files.
entries.nesquena/hermes-webui: A lightweight Python and JavaScript web interface designed to bring full Hermes CLI parity to browsers and mobile devices. It utilizes a three-panel layout that allows users to browse workspace files and view inline previews while interacting with the agent.
entries.fathah/hermes-desktop: A comprehensive desktop companion that guides users through installing and configuring Hermes Agent on local or remote backends. It stands out for its integration with 16 messaging gateways and its dedicated GUI for managing memory, personas, and scheduled tasks.
entries.EKKOLearnAI/hermes-web-ui: This dashboard focuses on multi-platform connectivity, offering unified configuration for eight messaging services including Telegram, Discord, and WhatsApp. It provides real-time chat with token tracking and multi-profile management to keep settings and memory scoped to specific tasks.
entries.outsourc-e/hermes-workspace: A native web workspace featuring a 'Swarm Mode' that uses tmux-backed workers and role-based dispatch for complex tasks. It integrates a Monaco-based file browser and a PTY terminal with a dedicated browser for memory, skills, and MCP catalogs.
entries.dodo-reach/hermes-desktop: A native macOS workspace that connects directly to Hermes hosts via SSH to provide real terminal access and session data. It includes specialized native views for Kanban boards, file management, and skill configuration.
entries.xaspx/hermes-control-interface: A self-hosted dashboard featuring the ZOO Swarm Monitor for tracking agent pipelines via a live event feed and Kanban view. It serves as a full MCP control plane, allowing users to edit configurations and tail logs in real-time.
entries.jazzyalex/agent-sessions: A privacy-focused macOS session browser that provides local-only indexing and search for Hermes Agent history without remote data uploads. Its 'Agent Cockpit' allows for live monitoring of active sessions and tracking of usage limits.
entries.nickvasilescu/hermes-desktop-os1: Designed for Orgo cloud computers and SSH hosts, this macOS interface offers one-click automated installation of Hermes Agent on fresh cloud VMs. It uniquely includes a WebRTC voice mode utilizing OpenAI Realtime for vocal interaction with the agent.
entries.Eynzof/hermes-agent-cn-desktop: A Windows-first desktop application built with Tauri and Rust that provides a native experience for managing the Hermes Agent kernel. It includes integrated tools for updates, memory management, and MCP skill configuration tailored for desktop users.
entries.liftaris/herm: An alternative TUI and dashboard built with OpenTUI that renders markdown, LaTeX, and inline images directly in the terminal. It uses Kanban boards for dispatching agentic work and provides a streamlined interface for managing profiles and environment variables.
entries.clawvader-tech/hermes-telegram-miniapp: A mobile-first React SPA that functions as a Telegram Mini App, providing a terminal-style UI for agent management on the go. It supports secure HMAC-SHA256 authentication and includes vision analysis capabilities for file attachments.
entries.aivrar/portable-hermes-agent: A zero-install Windows GUI that runs without admin rights or Docker, offering over 100 built-in tools including ComfyUI and MusicGen. It features a dynamic tool maker for creating custom API wrappers and Python handlers on the fly.
entries.pyrate-llama/hermes-ui: A glassmorphic web interface consisting of a single-file React application and a lightweight Python proxy. It provides real-time log streaming and a live workspace file browser for managing skills, cron jobs, and MCP tools.
entries.sanchomuzax/hermes-webui: A monitoring-focused dashboard that provides a real-time activity feed with cost tracking and model distribution analytics. It offers read-only inspection of agent skill sources and full-text search for analyzing extensive conversation histories.
entries.Euraika-Labs/pan-ui: A self-hosted workspace featuring real-time SSE streaming and a marketplace for discovering and installing new skills or MCP servers. It emphasizes security and organization through isolated profile management for separate API keys and memory stores.
entries.Felix-Forever/hermes-agent-desktop: A multi-agent desktop client that orchestrates collaboration between 20 specialized AI agents. It includes a visual 'Skill Store' for one-click installations and supports streaming SSE responses for a responsive chat experience.
